description: Model proposal flags a god-node followers list and recommends an index table.
notes: Seed shows /followers as a single top-level node with hundreds of thousands of children. Every client reads it whole. Skill playbook calls this out as a god-node anti-pattern: shard or replace with an index table keyed by user.
prompt: Our /followers node now has hundreds of thousands of entries and the app reads it on every screen. How should we restructure this?
